base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of lakitu — a character (playable) from 1992 super mario kart. Lakitu — holds start-flag + out-of-bounds fish-up + countdown signs. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
